titleStmt.title: SII 27.419: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 419. (A.R. No. 564 of 1929-30.) HATYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the prākāra of the Lōkanāthēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1492, Śukla, Jyēshṭha ba. 6, Monday. The details are irregular, the tithi corresponding to 1569 A.D., June 4.

It records a gift of land in Hoḷamage of Halasunāḍa-sīṁe by Baṁkiyarasa alias Ammidēvi-amma to Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭa, son of Bāḷēya Muruḍēśvara-bhaṭṭa of Basarūru, who in turn, gifted the same to the Uppaukallu-maṭha of the temple of Lōkanāthadēva of Haṭṭiyaṅgaḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vijayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1492 neya . śukla saṁvatsarada jēṣṭa ba 6 caṁdravāradalu śrīmatu baṁkiṁyarasaru
hoṁneya kaṁbaḷi voḍeyarāda Aṁmidēvi Aṁmanavarū basurrūru bāḷeya maruḍēśvarabhaṭṭara maga śaṁkharanārāyaṇabhaṭṭarige koṭṭa sahiraṁṇyōdaka dhaṁ
rmma dhārāpūrvakada mūlapaṭṭiya vakhaṇeya kramaveṁteṁdare halasunāḍa sīmeya voḷage hoḷamageyalli mūḍalusāla gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu bobba
riya kaṁbaḷi koṭṭippana Aruvārada bāḷagaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu Aṇayya sēnabōvage koṭṭa ceṁnakēśavanātha dēvarige hāyiva Akkibāḷu baṁkkana gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu kēśavanāthadēvarige
biṭṭa dēvasvada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya voḷagaṇa bayalu mu ... mekke mūḍalu mahaliṁgasavaḍana mekkayiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu savaḍara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu saṁṇaṇahebbā
rrana mekke gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu nāraṇāḷuvana teṁgina tōṭadiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya voḷagaṇa mekkemu . bidirahāḷeya makkemūḍalu mahaliṁga savaḍana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu ha
rida voḷiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu yeḷaūra beṁmaṇa seṭṭiya bāḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu bhānappagaḷa gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyoḷage makke 1 . mattaṁ mekke mūḍalu savaḍa
ragaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu jōgiya hitiliṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu paḍuvalu kōcumalagadeyiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu mahaliṁgasavaḍanakuḷiyana gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtīcatusīmeya
voḷagaṇa makke mu 1 mataṁ mekke mūḍalu mahaliṁgasavaḍana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu saṁku bhaṁḍāriya teṁginahittiliṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu mallappa seṭṭiya bāḷa gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu
mallappa seṭṭiya bāḷagaḍiyida mūḍalu baḍagalu mahaliṁga savaḍana bāḷagaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷage mere mu 1 Aṁttu bayalu mu ... mere mu 4 . Ubhayaṁ bayalu meresaha mu 5 Ayimuḍigaddege saluva nīru dhā
ri Akṣīṇi Āgāmika siddhasādhyaṁgaḷeṁbī Aṣṭabōgatējasvāmya maṁtāda sarvasvavanū nāu nivage sahiraṁṇyōdaka dharmadhārāpūrvakavāgi dhāreyanerradu mūlavāgi kōṭṭeU nīu yisarvva
svavanu Agumāḍikoṁḍu nīuniṁmasaṁtāna pāraṁpareyāgi mūlavāgi badubahudeṁdu koṭṭa sahiraṁṇyōdaka dharṁmadhārāpūrvvakada mūlapaṭṭe �yobāḷige terubeḍige Akara Aṁ
nyāya yēnū yilli sarvamānyavāgi baddu bahudu yeṁdu baredapaṭṭege sākṣigaḷu Ādityacaṁdrā Anilōnalaśca Ahaścarāpōhrudayaṁ yamaśca Ahaśca rātri Ubhēca saṁdhyādhaṁ
rmmēna jānāti narasyavrittaṁ . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyō nrupālanaṁ . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁpadaṁ . yiṁtappadakke baṁkeyarasaravoppa kāṁcana Aṁṇayyasēnabōvana bara
ha . �yo sarvvasvavanū bāḷeya muruḍēśvara bhaṭṭaramaga śaṁkharanārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaru tāu baddu haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyaluUpukalla maṭhakke dhātasaṁvatsarada māgha ba 3 lōkanātha dē
vara Arrā ṭṭeda divasadallū A Uppukalla maṭhada dharmakke dhāreyanerradu biṭṭaru
Digital edition of SII 27.419 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
